title: eccoilopus cotulifer
side_effects: Eccoilopus cotulifer can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and digestive issues. Ingestion of the plant's toxic compounds can lead to symptoms like nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. Prolonged exposure to the plant's volatile oils can cause respiratory problems, including coughing, wheezing, and shortness of breath. In severe cases, improper use of eccoilopus cotulifer can result in organ damage and even life-threatening complications.
